About Me

I am a Master's student in Computer Science with a passion for building clean, robust software. My academic work has focused on distributed systems, algorithms, and software architecture, and I enjoy applying theoretical knowledge to practical problems.

Academic Interests

  • Distributed Systems & Cloud Computing
  • Software Engineering & Architecture
  • Programming Languages & Compilers
  • Open Source Development

Career Direction

I am looking for a role where I can work on meaningful technical challenges, contribute to well-engineered systems, and continue learning from experienced engineers. I am particularly interested in backend infrastructure, platform engineering, and developer tooling.
